arguments.prompt:
Statistical analysis tool - Variable Selection (Step 3). Korean UI. Axiom Slate design.

Horizontal stepper: Step 1 done, Step 2 done, Step 3 ACTIVE (blue bar), Step 4 inactive.

Selected method at top: Independent Samples t-test with brief description.

Main content (8-col, two-panel layout):
Left panel - Variable Pool: List of data columns (column name, type icon, sample values). Draggable items.
Right panel - Role Slots: Dependent Variable slot (1 numeric) and Group Variable slot (1 categorical). Drag-to-assign. Filled slots show assigned variable with remove button.

Right sidebar (4-col):
Variable Info panel: descriptive stats when selected.
Method Requirements: what this test needs.

Bottom: Back button + Run Analysis button.
